setup: Yo mama is so ugly that... well..
I never wanted to believe that my Dad was stealing from his job as a road worker.
punchline: But when I got home, all the signs were there.

setup: A guy told me there was a shark attack today. The shark took out his whole left side…
punchline: I couldn't believe it when he told me he was all right!

setup: I thought about going on an all-almond diet.

punchline: I'm not included in anything either!

setup: What did the 0 say to the 8?
What is worse then finding a worm in your Apple?
punchline: Finding half a worm in your Apple.

setup: Why was the broom late for the meeting?
I wonder what you get if you cross a rhinoceros and an elephant?
I once pulled a muscle mining for gold.
What do you call a fashionable lawn statue with an excellent sense of rhythm?
I just read a book about Stockholm syndrome.
punchline: It was pretty bad at first, but by the end I liked it.

setup: What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost?
What do you call an old snowman?
What did the Buffalo say to his little boy when he dropped him off at school?
I used to hate facial hair,
punchline: but then it grew on me.

setup: What did the shy pebble wish for?
punchline: That she was a little boulder.
